title: Delcasa DC1674 Nylon Turner, White
features: ✅ FUMBLE-FREE FLIPPING - Thin, flexible edges glide under foods in the pan to keep them intact. The turner is ideal for sautéing, flipping eggs, lifting cookies and more.

✅ ANTI-SCRATCH DESIGN – Sturdy and comfortable kitchen turner made of anti-scratch nylon for safe use on non-stick pans. And because it won’t scratch, it’s great for removing that last little bit of mashed potato or sticky vegetables.

✅ DURABLE, HEAT SAFE & EASY CLEANING - This cooking turner is made of sturdy, heat-resistant nylon, so it's great for flipping and sautéing food items. Along with heat safe it is resistant to stains and odours, so it’s really easy to clean.

✅ ERGONOMIC HANDLE, EASY STORAGE - Ergonomic handle for comfortable grip to flip your food without falling anything, and thumb rest provides a secure grip, while its hanging loop makes it easy to store.

✅ MULTIPURPOSE TURNER - SERVE WITH STYLE - Whether folding, sautéing, flipping, turning, serving or lifting, this high quality turner can meet all your kitchen needs.! Made of high-quality nylon that's kind to non-stick pans.
description: This nylon turner is ideal for number of cooking tasks – from stirring to flipping, sautéing, lifting, turning or serving fish or other food that is cooked in a frying pan. It's heat-resistant, so you can safely use it in hot pots and pans without having to worry about it melting. And with its sturdy handle, you always have total control whatever you're cooking. Whether it's flipping the omelette or sautéing, this sturdy spoon will always be up to the task. What a bargain! Safe for non-stick Safe for non-stick cookware, bakeware and electrics. No nicks, no scuffs and no scratches! Ideal for flipping eggs, burgers, crepes and more Comfortable to use The turner spoon boasts an ergonomic handle. This makes serving and sautéing much more comfortable. And with its soft-touch design, it's really easy to maintain a secure hold as your flip, turn or serve. Stain and odour-resistant Thanks to its heavy-duty nylon design, this turner spatula won't discolour or absorb odours. This makes it ideal when you're cooking with strong or colourful ingredients, such as blackberries and cinnamon. Durable and heat safe This cooking spoon is made of sturdy, heat-resistant nylon, so it's great for stirring hot pans of soup or scooping up servings of sauce. It’s heat safe, so you don't have to worry about it melting. Easy to store away Its long handle features a built-in hanging loop. This means you can simply hang it up on a kitchen hook or a utensils rack once you’ve finished.
